summary: Completed testing of Phase 1 Script Cleaning Layer. All 17 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. The deterministic cleaning function correctly normalizes raw PDF OCR text, the review/edit screen works properly, and cleaned_text is saved to MongoDB and used as the source of truth for line extraction.
passed_tests: POST /api/clean-text - strips page numbers, normalizes whitespace - PASS
POST /api/clean-text - joins (MORE)/(CONT'D) page-break splits - PASS
POST /api/clean-text - fixes concatenated scene numbers (20INT. -> INT.) - PASS
POST /api/clean-text - adds blank lines before character names - PASS
POST /api/clean-text - handles empty input - PASS
POST /api/clean-script - returns all scenes with cleaned text for booked script - PASS
POST /api/clean-script - returns scenes sorted by scene_number - PASS
POST /api/clean-script - works for older script - PASS
POST /api/clean-script - returns 404 for non-existent script - PASS
POST /api/save-cleaned-script - batch saves cleaned text for scenes - PASS
POST /api/save-cleaned-script - returns 400 for empty scenes - PASS
POST /api/save-cleaned-text - saves single breakdown cleaned text - PASS
POST /api/save-cleaned-text - returns 404 for non-existent breakdown - PASS
GET /api/scripts/{id} - uses cleaned_text for line extraction - PASS
GET /api/scripts/{id} - falls back to original_text when cleaned_text not available - PASS
clean_script_text - collapses multiple blank lines - PASS
clean_script_text - strips leading/trailing blanks - PASS
Script Review screen loads when clicking a script from home page - PASS
Review screen shows scene tabs with correct navigation - PASS
Edit button toggles to editable textarea - PASS
Preview button toggles back to preview mode - PASS
Reset button present (restores auto-cleaned version) - PASS
Confirm All button saves all scenes and redirects to ScriptOverview - PASS
Review Script button in ScriptOverview header opens review screen - PASS
My Lines tab shows correct cue/line pairs parsed from cleaned text (6 lines found) - PASS
Full Scene tab shows full scene text - PASS
Breakdown tab shows AI analysis - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: clean_script_text() function (server.py lines 104-230) is well-implemented with 6 passes: strip page numbers, join MORE/CONT'D, fix scene number prefixes, normalize whitespace, add blank lines before character names, collapse multiple blanks
GET /api/scripts/{id} (line 1843-1844) correctly uses cleaned_text with fallback to original_text: parse_text = b.get('cleaned_text') or b.get('original_text', '')
ScriptReview.jsx properly loads scenes via /api/clean-script, maintains editedTexts state, and saves via /api/save-cleaned-script
App.js correctly routes to review screen first (handleLoadScript -> setView('review')), then to ScriptOverview after confirmation (handleReviewConfirmed)
seed_data_creation: Used existing Felix scripts: 67c7477b-b334-40f8-ab1f-6cc08cd2b21a (BOOKED, 21 scenes) and 473f064c-dedd-475d-90de-091ee54ca708 (older)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Script Cleaning Layer (Phase 1) fully tested. Key endpoints: /api/clean-text (deterministic cleaning), /api/clean-script (clean all scenes), /api/save-cleaned-script (batch save), /api/save-cleaned-text (single save). ScriptReview.jsx component handles review/edit flow with data-testid attributes: script-review, review-scene-tab-{i}, toggle-edit-btn, scene-edit-textarea, scene-preview, reset-scene-btn, confirm-all-btn, review-back-btn. ScriptOverview has review-script-btn to re-open review. cleaned_text is persisted to MongoDB breakdowns collection and used by GET /api/scripts/{id} for line extraction.

clean_text_endpoint.details: POST /api/clean-text accepts raw text and returns cleaned text with page numbers stripped, MORE/CONT'D joined, scene numbers fixed, whitespace normalized

clean_script_endpoint.details: POST /api/clean-script accepts script_id and returns all scenes with cleaned_text, sorted by scene_number

save_cleaned_script_endpoint.details: POST /api/save-cleaned-script accepts script_id and scenes array, persists cleaned_text to MongoDB breakdowns

save_cleaned_text_endpoint.details: POST /api/save-cleaned-text saves cleaned_text for a single breakdown

get_script_uses_cleaned_text.details: GET /api/scripts/{id} uses cleaned_text for line extraction when available, falls back to original_text

script_review_screen.details: Loads when clicking a script from home page, shows all scenes with navigation tabs

edit_preview_toggle.details: Edit button toggles to editable textarea, Preview button toggles back

reset_button.details: Reset button present to restore auto-cleaned version

confirm_all_button.details: Saves all scenes and redirects to ScriptOverview

review_script_button.details: Review Script button in ScriptOverview header opens the review screen

my_lines_tab.details: Shows correct cue/line pairs parsed from cleaned text (6 lines found in Scene 1)
